posts.text:
Believe My Work Not Words !!
Duct cleaning is so necessary. What are you breathing???🐾🐁🕷🦗🐜 

We are charging a flat price for the whole house Duct Cleaning

IF ANYONE INTERESTED 

I guarantee all my work.

The first THREE (3) COMMENTERS will get a special DISCOUNT

Our service package includes the following:

.Unlimited Ducts

.Unlimited Vents

. No Hookup Charges

. Modified equipment Truck Vacuum System

You must consider duct cleaning if you have

. Residents with allergies and asthma

·Smoker in the household

·Hair and dander from pet

·Done duct cleaning more than a year ago

HOW DO WE DO OUR SERVICES:

We use Modified equipped trucks with commercial vacuum and commercial compressors. We hook up our vacuum to the main line to draw more than 25,000 cu. ft of air per minute throughout the entire air distribution system, then blow compressed air, which is 350 pounds (per square inch) through each ductwork to get 100% cleaning results

Thanks. 😊

c.text: Interested people PM me your house size.
No hookup cost, no pervent cost and no hidden cost at all.
